34! It has been 34 long and terrible days away from what I love to do. This is the longest in over 10 years that I haven't been working on you awesome people. Wearing a face mask is the most normal I have felt out of all of this. I miss my clients. I miss my coworkers and I miss my friends. So how about showing me those awesome face mask shots. I know you have them...lol. Hope to see all of you soon

I am super excited to announce the start of the process of getting back to doing what I love. There have been many inquiries about piercings during this strenuous time and I look forward to working with each and every one of you. That being said there will be new guidelines you as clients may need to follow and I would appreciate your understanding in these times of transition. If you have contacted me during these last few months and still wish to have work done please inbox me your information so I may get you all set up. Thank you.
Went creeping in the jeep and found a flex point after some crazy rock climbing. What a great day in Granby, Massachusetts
#blackouttuesday

Wednesday is the day. Back to work I go. So many have reached out to me over the last 3 months it's overwhelming. If you wish to get work done by me please don't hesitate to reach out to me personally through here, the shop, or my facebook. Thank you all for your continued support. I look forward to opening and seeing all of you again.

I am back tomarrow. If for any reason I have missed you in my call backs I am very sorry and please bare with me. We will be taking walk in questions about availability but please no waiting in the lobby. Appointments are best. Please reach out to me to get into the book as it is filling up fast. See you all soon.

Fresh flat piercing with a stunning 14k yellow gold "beading heart" by our friends at @junipurrjewelry. What a brilliant choice for this piercing

Been so busy,, so sorry for the lack of posts! Fresh double helix with titanium set cz solitaires in cascading size. This picture is what you see vs what you don't. Solid 14k gold "Temple" upgrade for this client by our friends at @tawapa. Delicately layered beading over a scallop edge gives this piece such amazing depth.

Piercings not done by me but happily upgraded to all solid 14k white gold threadless ends by our friends at @buddhajewelryorganics. Featuring the "Staxx"with genuine white topaz(second hole) the "desden"(3rd and 5th holes) and the "multiplicity" (4th hole)
Super rad fresh septum piercing with a solid 14k white gold barbed wire cup and divit ring from our friends at @tawapa. I just love how intricate this piece is, with a full wrap around barb concept.

This client has a love of mixed metals. So for her fresh double conch we used a solid 14k yellow gold "Tauriel" by our friends at @junipurrjewelry and a titanium prong set cz solitaire underneath. Two delicate pieces... One dynamic look!

This daith is simple buddahful! Solid 14k yellow gold "Simone" made by our good friends at @buddhajewelryorganics. This piece demands attention with 5 genuine @swarovski czs in cascading size surrounded by delicate beading for a truly stellar addition to any piercees collection.
Fresh double tragus for the super rad client. Featuring 2 genuine @swarovski czs titanium prong set solitaires and titanium flat back labret studs by @neometaljewelry

Fresh double helix piercing on Alex! She decided on a solid 14k yellow gold "Gala" and a solid 14k yellow gold "zuri" both by our amazing friends at @buddhajewelryorganics. These two pieces go so well together. What's not to love?

Meet the "Lyra"! She is one of the January drops from our amazing friends at @buddhajewelryorganics. Solid 14k white gold with genuine reticulated quartz center stone with a double cz side accent. We have a few different combinations available currently... so check my story out for other versions!

Fresh tragus done with a solid 14k yellow gold "Limelight" with genuine tourmalated quartz from the January launch and our great friends at @buddhajewelryorganics. Cut to perfection...where each piece is completely different. What a great fit for this amazing clients anatomy!

Fresh conch piercing using a solid 14k white gold "Elevate" with genuine moss agate from our friends at @buddhajewelryorganics. This obtuse kite cut is elegantly accented by a delicate row of czs along the outer edge, for a brilliant addiction to this clients current ear project.
Fresh outer helix piercing with a solid 14k yellow gold "koi" from our friends at @junipurrjewelry. Perfectly detailed and flawlessly intricate this piece demands a second look.

Awesome little second lobe piercing with a stellar "luna moth" solid 14k yellow gold threadless end by our friends at @junipurrjewelry. Brilliantly detailed and elegant down to the 4 micro czs in the wings. The perfect piece for a client who absolutely loves Luna moths.

Fresh daith with a solid 14k white gold "Gemma trio" seamless ring by our amazing friends at @buddhajewelryorganics. Fresh conch piercing with a solid 14k yellow gold "Dani" by ourfriends at @junipurrjewelry.  This delicately arched threadless end contains alternating faux opal and czs in a cascade for the perfect fit.

Fresh outer lower helix with a solid 14k white gold "Multiplicity" and a fresh lower flat with a solid 14k white gold "Warhol" both made by our amazing friends at @buddhajewelryorganics. Fresh nostril piercing with a solid 14k rose gold threadless "Tauriel" from our friends at @junipurrjewelry. This design offers a slightly bolder statement than just a cz solitaire and is balanced to perfection.

Holy deep helix! Fresh flat piercing with a solid 14k white gold "Cascade" by our forever friends at @buddhajewelryorganics. These three czs sit in a row format with 3 white gold chain link style chains in a true waterfall like style. What a jaw dropping pierce for this super rad client!

Fresh conch piercing with a super rad 14k yellow gold "elevate" with genuine ruticulated quartz with cz trim.
